commands.observed: Pinned task identity, validated path diversity, local docker grades, and Phase 1 control seal.
Nine HUD Docker baselines passed with stable environment_version/task_checksum; corrupt-control negative returned reward 0; Phase 2 seal written.
PASS: 23 text file(s) are at most 500 lines

checks.name: Task pinned and materialized
checks.evidence: fixtures/chronos/mongodb-sales-aggregation-engine/task_identity.json records terminal_wrench_revision d8a29613, grader digest ecaf1222, verifier harness digest 5783dd7c, and Dockerfile digest 87cbdebd.

checks.name: Path diversity established
checks.evidence: Three controls labeled path-a, path-b, and path-c with diversity_rationales.json citing single-match/addFields/python-round, two-match/server-round, and correlated lookup pipeline shapes.

checks.name: Local grader success
checks.evidence: Each control passes all 13 tests via scripts/grade_control_in_docker.sh and tests/chronos/controls/test_local_grader.py.

checks.name: Controls sealed
checks.evidence: fixtures/chronos/mongodb-sales-aggregation-engine/controls.json phase 2 with immutable content digests and frozen_at timestamp.

checks.name: HUD baseline stability
checks.evidence: Nine DockerRuntime baselines (3 per control) scored reward 1.0 with consistent environment_version 57cb7f09-89c1-487b-8463-b525edf01153 and task_checksum 08258e81 across runs; trace refs recorded in controls.json and artifacts/chronos/controls/baseline_runs.json.

checks.name: Corrupt-control negative
checks.evidence: Stub SalesAnalyzer baseline through HUD DockerRuntime returned reward 0.0.

artifacts.description: Control materialization, diversity validation, freeze/seal, local grading, HUD baseline runner, and CLI.
Three path-diverse query.py controls, task_identity.json, diversity_rationales.json, and sealed controls.json.
Behavior tests for identity, diversity, local grader, immutability, and Phase 2 manifest completeness.
Ephemeral mongo:7.0 local grader used by plan-004-tests and materialize.
Recorded HUD baseline run metadata and corrupt-control negative result.
Verified plan-004-tests and integration-controls mapped argv entries.

skips: HUD baselines use DockerRuntime with the repository-built chronos/mongodb-sales-aggregation-engine-v1 image rather than hosted hud eval --remote, matching Plan 001 local-runtime evidence.
notes: Gate 2 control prerequisite satisfied: three path-diverse legitimate controls are frozen under the pinned v1 grader before Plan 005 patch evaluation.
